runs.emptyBody: Once you export an agent to CI, every automated review shows up here.
runs.emptyCta: Set up CI for an agent
runs.errorBody: Something went wrong fetching CI runs.
runs.title: CI Runs
runs.subtitle: Agent reviews executed inside CI · not local runs

exportWizard.title: Export to CI
exportWizard.subtitle: Run {agentName} automatically on pull requests
exportWizard.repoHint: owner/name — the repo to add the workflow to
exportWizard.repoInvalid: Use the owner/name format, e.g. acme/payments-api — not a full URL
exportWizard.blockMergeDesc: Set Fail CI on (CI tab) so the run exits non-zero, then add a required status check in the repo's GitHub branch protection. No GitHub App needed.
exportWizard.installCardTitle: Open a PR with these files
exportWizard.installCardBody: DevDigest opens a PR in {repo} titled “Add DevDigest CI review” with the {count} generated files.
exportWizard.secretNote: Add {key} to the repo's Actions secrets before the workflow runs.

ciTab.emptyBody: Deploy this agent to run automatically on every pull request in a repo's CI pipeline.
ciTab.activeInRepos: {count, plural, one {Active in # repo} other {Active in # repos}}
ciTab.failCiOnHint: Exit non-zero when a finding at or above this severity lands. Pair with a required status check to block merges.

publishDialog.title: Publish to CI
publishDialog.subtitle: Run {agentName} on every pull request in {repo}
publishDialog.intro: Opens a pull request in {repo} adding a GitHub Actions workflow + this agent's config under .devdigest/. On every PR the agent reviews the diff.
publishDialog.secretNote: Add {key} to the repo's Actions secrets before the workflow runs. GITHUB_TOKEN is provided automatically.
publishDialog.doneBody: Opened/updated a pull request in {repo} with the workflow + agent config.
